ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of inserting a card into an ATM.  The robot will mimic this action using its arms. Frame 1 shows the arms at rest. Frame 2 shows the right arm extending forward, slightly downward, as if holding a card. Frame 3 shows the right arm moving inward, simulating the card insertion into the ATM. Frame 4 shows the arm returning to its resting position. The left arm remains largely still throughout to provide visual contrast and balance.

frames.beat: both arms hang at the sides, ready
right arm extends forward, holding a card
right arm pushes the card into the slot
